_comment: Canonical MCP server definitions. Edit this file and run scripts/render-mcp.sh to regenerate each tool's native MCP config block. Schema: each server has either a `url` + `transport` (for remote HTTP/SSE servers) OR a `command` + `args` (for local stdio servers). Optional: `description`, `headers`, `env`, `enabled`.

linear.description: Linear — issues, projects, comments. OAuth 2.1 (interactive on first use).
